folio.label: 32r
folio.l: The fallyng of the Toures , and of the walles
Vp on the Mynour , or the Carpentere
I slow Sampsou~ , shakyng the pylere
And myne ben , the maladyes colde
The derk tresou~ , and the castes olde
My lokyng is , the fader , of pestilence
Now wepe nomore , I shal don diligence
That Palamon , æ is thyn owen knygút
Shal haue his lady , as æè hast hi~ higút
This Mars , shal helpe his knygút ©et , natheles
Be twix ©ow , there mot , be som tyme pees
Al be ©e©e nat , of oo complecciou~
That causeth al day , swicú deuysiou~
I am thyn al redy , at thy wylle
Wepe now nomore , I wol thy lust fulfille
¢ Now wol I stynt , of the goddes a boue
Of Mars and of venus , goddesse of loue
And tellen ©ow , as pleynly as I can
The grete effect , for which æ I bygan
Gret was the fest , at Athenes that day
And eke the lusty sesou~ , of that May
Made euäy wygút , to ben in swicú plesance
That al that Monday , Iusten they and daunce
And spenden it , in venus hey seruyse
And by the cause , that they shulden ryse
Erly for to sen , the grete sigút
Vn to here reest , went they at nygút
And on æe morwe , whan the day gan spryng
Of hors and harneys , noyse and clat äyng
There was , in hostryes al a boute
And to the Paleys , rod æäe many a route
Of lordes , vp on stedes and palfreyes
¢ There maist æè sen , deuysyng of harneys
So vnkouth , and so riche , and wrou©t so wele
Of goldsmythrie , of browdyng and of stele
The sheldes brigút , testres and trappures
Gold hewen helmes , hauberkes Cotearmåes
Lordes in parementis , or here courseres
Knygútes of retenue , and eke squyeres
Naylyng the speres , and helmes bokelyng
Gynggynge of sheldes , w layneres lassyng
There as nede is , they were no thyng Idel
The fomy steedes , on the goldene brydel
Gnawyng , and faste the armures also
With fyle and hamer , prykyng to and fro
